text:
特訓にもいろいろあると思うけど
ただ強い敵を倒すだけじゃ
ダメだと思うんだよねー。

数をこなすこともまた
上達への近道だと思うんだ。

そこでわたしが考えた訓練メニューは
機甲種を続けて２０体倒すこと！
どう？　イケそう？

ずばずばずばっと仕留めていけば
２０体なんて、あっとい

There are all sorts of ways you can go about
doing some serious training, but I wouldn't
focus on just tackling tough enemies.

One sure way to improve fast is to force
yourself to handle a large number of foes.

So that's why my next training regimen has
you set to take down twenty automata, one
after the next! Whaddya say? Think you can
handle it?

Slice and dice 'em like you know how and
you'll hit that twenty mark before you
even know it!
